title: Shrub's Modernized NTM
description: A modern look for HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod!
body:
A pack that makes the textures of the excellent "[HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm)" consistent with the modern (post-Village and Pillage) look of the game! The pack is nowhere near finished, and I have no schedule for when I'll update it, but it will get updated eventually.

This texture pack is for NTM on 1.7.10! It will not work properly on any unofficial port of the mod!

Also requires a vanilla texture backport pack, as this one only changes the mod textures. I recommend [this one](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/actually-correct-1-14-texture-backport).

Textures mostly created by myself, with additional work from Drillgon200, Hoboy, and Pheo. Based on the work of Jasper Boerstra (JAPPA) and Robert Katzinsky (HBM).
